title: Mass-Augmenter
desc: Generative data augmentation CLI framework using Factory/Strategy patterns, Gemini 3.1 Pro, SAM 3.1, and Nano Banana to inject physically consistent synthetic data into YOLO11 training sets. Will be open source soon.

title: ProtMamba
desc: State-Space Model for generative protein language modeling that avoids Transformer quadratic bottlenecks with linear-time inference. Contribution: parameter optimizations and training note improvements.

title: Zenith AI (TEKNOFEST)
desc: Vision-based navigation and object detection repository for the GPS-denied UAV challenge at TEKNOFEST Aviation AI competition. Contribution: mAP calculation logic revisions and model metric optimization.

title: SkateSync AI
desc: Platform unifying voice and vision AI for figure skating coaching with BPM rhythm analysis, an LLM coaching engine, and VLM-based video evaluation in a single full-stack app built in 24 hours.

title: The Traitor
desc: Built SFML client UI for menu, lobby, and action phases plus avatar selection and win/lose screens, integrated with packet-based TCP client-server multiplayer gameplay. Contribution: action phase UI design, lobby screen, map, and font additions.

title: LetMeFind
desc: Hybrid e-commerce product discovery system orchestrating intent analysis, semantic search, and deterministic filtering so users can find products through natural language.

title: privacy-policy-analyzer
desc: Command-line tool that automatically fetches, analyzes, and scores website privacy policies with AI to highlight strengths, risks, and recommendations.

title: AYBUStore
desc: E-commerce platform that brings the university campus store online, built with Next.js and Firebase Auth for a fast and secure shopping experience.

title: Endpoint Detector
desc: Python-based Voice Activity Detection system using Short-Time Energy and a double-threshold algorithm, with preprocessing, morphological post-processing, and visualization tools.

title: Spikeflight
desc: 2D platformer where a tiny red adventurer traverses floating islands and lures enemies into spikes, built with interactive UI and menu scenes as a foundation for later physics work.

title: micrograd
desc: Foundational neural network project built from scratch by following Andrej Karpathy's tutorials to deeply understand automatic differentiation and core AI architecture mechanics.
